scripts.build-plugin: vite build && powershell New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist-plugin && powershell Copy-Item -Path package.json -Destination dist-plugin/ && powershell Copy-Item -Path dist -Destination dist-plugin/ -Recurse -Force && powershell Compress-Archive -Path dist-plugin/* -DestinationPath unihub-plugin-counter.zip -Force && powershell Remove-Item -Path dist-plugin -Recurse -Force

unihub.name: 计数器
unihub.description: 一个简单的计数器插件
unihub.author: UniHub Team
